title: Live Chat Translator
body:
[![Swills](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModderZellior/Image/main/bannerofswills.jpg)](https://swills.gg/?ref=ZELLIOR)

Break language barriers on international Minecraft servers with real-time client-side chat translation.

Live Chat Translator automatically translates foreign multiplayer chat messages into your preferred language directly inside your local chat box. It also lets you send translated messages, making it easier to talk with players from around the world. English is default.

Features:
- Automatically translates incoming multiplayer chat
- Set your chat translation language with _/tr chat <language>_
- Send translated messages with _/tr msg <language> <message>_
- Toggle translation on and off with _/tr on and /tr off_
- Client-side only
- No API key required
- Supports every language Google Translate supports.
- 1.8.9 support for Hypixel
  
<details>
<summary>Languages</summary>

**Link: [Supported Languages](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Google_Translate#Supported_languages)**

- A-B: Abkhaz, Acehnese, Acholi, Afar, Afrikaans, Albanian, Alur, Amharic, Arabic, Armenian, Assamese, Avar, Awadhi, Aymara, Azerbaijani, Balinese, Baluchi, Bambara, Baoulé, Bashkir, Basque, Batak Karo, Batak Simalungun, Batak Toba, Belarusian, Bemba, Bengali, Betawi, Bhojpuri, Bikol, Bosnian, Breton, Bulgarian, Buryat.

- C-E: Cantonese, Catalan, Cebuano, Chamorro, Chechen, Chichewa, Chinese (Simplified), Chinese (Traditional), Chuukese, Chuvash, Corsican, Crimean Tatar, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dari, Dhivehi, Dinka, Dogri, Dombe, Dutch, Dyula, Dzongkha, English, Esperanto, Estonian, Ewe.

- F-H: Faroese, Fijian, Filipino (Tagalog), Finnish, Fon, French, Frisian, Friulian, Fulani, Ga, Galician, Georgian, German, Greek, Guarani, Gujarati, Haitian Creole, Hakha Chin, Hausa, Hawaiian, Hebrew, Hiligaynon, Hindi, Hmong, Hungarian, Hunsrik.

- I-L: Iban, Icelandic, Igbo, Ilocano, Indonesian, Irish, Italian, Jamaican Patois, Japanese, Javanese, Jingpo, Kalaallisut, Kannada, Kanuri, Kapampangan, Kazakh, Khasi, Khmer, Kiga, Kikongo, Kinyarwanda, Kituba, Kokborok, Komi, Konkani, Korean, Krio, Kurdish (Kurmanji), Kurdish (Sorani), Kyrgyz, Lao, Latgalian, Latin, Latvian, Ligurian, Limburgish, Lingala, Lithuanian, Lombard.
 
- M-P: Luo, Madurese, Makassar, Malagasy, Malay, Maltese, Mam, Manx, Maori, Marathi, Marshallese, Marwadi, Mauritian Creole, Meadow Mari, Minang, Mizo, Mongolian, Myanmar (Burmese), Nahuatl, Ndau, Ndebele (South), Nepali, Nepalbhasa (Newari), NKo, Norwegian, Nuer, Occitan, Oromo, Ossetian, Pangasinan, Papiamento, Pashto, Persian, Polish, Portuguese, Punjabi.

- Q-S: Q'eqchi', Romani, Romanian, Russian, Rundi, Samoan, Sami (North), Sango, Santali, Scots Gaelic, Sepedi, Serbian, Sesotho, Seychellois Creole, Shan, Shona, Sicilian, Silesian, Sindhi, Sinhala, Slovak, Slovenian, Somali, Spanish, Sundanese, Susu, Swahili, Swati.

- T-Z: Tahitian, Tajik, Tamazight, Tamil, Tatar, Telugu, Tetum, Thai, Tibetan, Tigrinya, Tiv, Tok Pisin, Tongan, Tsonga, Tswana, Tulu, Tumbuka, Turkish, Turkmen, Tuvan, Udmurt, Ukrainian, Urdu, Uzbek, Venda, Venetian, Vietnamese, Waray, Welsh, Wolof, Xhosa, Yakut, Yiddish, Yoruba, Yucatec Maya, Zapotec, Zulu.
</details>

_If there are bugs or issues, please report them._
